feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Imagine being a zoomer
entry.content: Zoomers will never experience 1992-2002 videogame era. They will never experience metal gear solid, FFVI, FFVII, mario 64, donkey kong, metal gear solid 2, Resident evil 1-3, Age of empires 2, freeciv, Silent Hill 1, Soccer with powers, SNES captain tsubasa, tales of phantasia, super mario rpg, FFIV, FFV, FFI, super mario bros, pacman, galaga, galaxian, Duo princess, NES Tetris, Castlevania 1, 3, SOTN, Super Metroid, Parasite Eve, Wild arms, Mario kart 64, Bahamut Lagoon, NES and SNES platformer

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Do you believe that we could reclaim the internet? Not in a culture war or polit…
entry.content: Do you believe that we could reclaim the internet? Not in a culture war or political way, I mean from corporations and governments. Every website tracks every possible data point it can. Every device is key logging, tracking mouse movements, engagement, etc. Simple websites require ID verification, SMS verification, connections to other websites and forms of contact. All with the intent to recreate your identity in their records. There is no free space on the internet anymore. Everything is cont

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 4th gen 4runner
entry.content: I purchased a 03' V8 4Ruster with low mileage and I'm thinking about upgrading it after I get the issues worked out. The thing runs great but it had some frame rust that I've taken care of. Got some Falkans on it which I love. Replaced a rusted exhaust and now I'm looking at the breaks and the exhaust manifold as it has a hole in it though it's not terrible. Once that's all finished I'll probably get a bit of body work done to address some minor body damage and rust. The big question I have is w

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Very soon, your phone will lock you out of virtually all of its functions until …
entry.content: Very soon, your phone will lock you out of virtually all of its functions until you give it your ID. You will not be able to use your browser, camera or any third-party apps including banking apps you've downloaded. Not even the password manager. This starts with Texas, but as we've seen with ID verification laws so far, rapid expansion is to be expected. Also, your next computer will cost you $30,000 minimum. Fuck you. I Love The Future

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Scamstang GTD
entry.content: >be deceived by fake laptime >pay 400k for a car >slower than a base model >numb steering just like the base model >while requiring exotic car level of maintenance >be pissed >can’t even sell the car for 2 years after receiving it Ford? More like Fraud lmao

entry.content: >Rough Fucking Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83732257 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentr

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why should or shouldn't I get a sportstruck? On one hand, it's a worse sportscar…
entry.content: Why should or shouldn't I get a sportstruck? On one hand, it's a worse sportscar overall than a comparable coupe. Higher center of gravity, worse weight distribution, more weight overall, so just generally slower and worse handling than a coupe with the same mods but also costs more. On the other hand, it's really cool.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Do people simply drive more now? 20 years ago it seemed like people scoffed at a…
entry.content: Do people simply drive more now? 20 years ago it seemed like people scoffed at a car if it had over 100k miles. Now it seems like 200-250k is the minimum before people get skeptical and every decent used car seems like it has absurd miles.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I should enjoy video games but I can't. I have large backlog on GOG and around 3…
entry.content: I should enjoy video games but I can't. I have large backlog on GOG and around 30 games on Steam backlog but either no emotions at all when taking a look, no desire to act in any way or too afraid to play them after finding out about various problems like EOS, privacy issues and so on. I don't even know if putting game on Windows firewall blockade would work. Now is the season for sales and yet I feel no urge to buy anything at all from my lists, afraid that it would end just the same as with ga

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is eBay so uncompetitive with AliExpress? An entire month plus 40$ in shippi…
entry.content: Why is eBay so uncompetitive with AliExpress? An entire month plus 40$ in shipping fees to deliver a kilogram to Europe is laughably bad. With AliExpress, you'd get free or inexpensive shipping and less than 2 weeks delivery time. This is a good metaphor for the USA versus China.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Solaar 1.1.20 just dropped! Tons of new features, but I mostly use it to change …

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is there any reliable way to watch fifa world cup for free? Like an app or websi…
entry.content: Is there any reliable way to watch fifa world cup for free? Like an app or website that actually works on an Android TV? Preferably a good quality stream from a good server.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Chronovisor and the Dark Web
entry.content: You know what they say, "you can find anything on the Dark web, anything at all". Can you find a real, working Chronovisor on there then if nothing else? Because wouldn't it be sweet to see what dinosaurs actually looked like, what ancient Greek Pankration actually looked like, what Chopin's own piano playing actually sounded like and more? That's what I would want to find out if I had my very own Chronovisor.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I was so confused why I was suffering from this cold/detached/depressed feeling …
entry.content: I was so confused why I was suffering from this cold/detached/depressed feeling and I realized today that it was because I had given up on normal life. Now I promised myself I will do something and that I can't keep living like this and I feel good again. The only thing I need is a wife, how hard could finding a loving wife would be? There are billions of women out there just waiting for me.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What exactly is the point of pre-ordering a digital game that will never run out…
entry.content: What exactly is the point of pre-ordering a digital game that will never run out anyway? >muh pre order bonus cosmetics You could literally buy it the day before it comes out and still get that if its that important to you. You don't need to worry about it 5 months in advance and your just telling devs you'll buy whatever slop they shit out.

entry.content: It's time to replace the bloated, adware ridden, slow and unresponsive launcher of your TV Download one of these launchers: >Barelauncher: https://github.com/f102mithunysypdl cjr-pixel/BareLauncherv3 or >ArcLauncher: https://github.com/meddouribadis/ar clauncher/ >ENABLE DEVELOPER OPTIONS, ENABLE USB DEBUGGING!!! (In Android system settings, just Google it) >Launcher manager To set it as your launcher (scroll to "LAUNCHER MANAGER (Android TV)" section): >DO THIS AFTER YOUR CUSTOM LAUNCHER IS INS

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Here's what those of us who once kind of liked the Guess Who always hoped they'd…
entry.content: Here's what those of us who once kind of liked the Guess Who always hoped they'd become, and if that sounds dumb to the rest of you, you're missing something. This may be crude as a ploughboy, but Randy Bachman has always had a way with the catchy riff, and Turner, I suppose, provides the overdrive. B+
